components.name: VHF Data Radio
components.description: VHF data radio for ACARS communication.

functions.name: Route Upload
functions.description: Receives and validates uplinked route data.

interfaces.name: Ground to FMS Route Uplink
interfaces.description: ACARS uplink carrying route amendments from ground to FMS.

stride.S_justification: Unauthenticated ACARS uplink allows route spoofing by ground impersonation.
stride.T_justification: Route data can be tampered in transit without integrity protection.
stride.R_justification: No digital signature; sender repudiation possible.
stride.I_justification: Route amendments carry sensitive flight intent data.
stride.D_justification: Jamming of VHF channel could deny route updates.
stride.E_justification: Malformed uplink could exploit FMS parsing vulnerabilities.

threats.name: Route Spoofing via Unauthenticated ACARS Uplink
threats.description: An adversary transmits a forged ACARS uplink to alter the active flight route in the FMS without aircrew awareness.
